title: eventCategory
description:
Selects the Event Category to include in the response.
  * **CASH_DIVS** = Cash Dividends
  * **STOCK_DIST** = Stock Distributions
  * **SPINOFFS** = Spin Offs
  * **RIGHTS** = Rights Issue
  * **SPLITS** = Splits
  * **ALL** = Returns all Event Types. If left blank the service will default to ALL.
